accessibility-for-motion.name: accessibility-for-motion
accessibility-for-motion.description: Ensures animations respect user preferences (prefers-reduced-motion) and are keyboard accessible. Activate on every interactive project.

anime-cel-shading.name: anime-cel-shading
anime-cel-shading.description: Implements toon/cel shading materials for 3D models. Activate when aiming for a stylized, non-photorealistic 3D look.

anime-impact-frame-system.name: anime-impact-frame-system
anime-impact-frame-system.description: Implements high-contrast, brief flash frames to emphasize powerful animations. Activate to add 'punch' to significant interactions.

anime-motion-principles.name: anime-motion-principles
anime-motion-principles.description: Applies traditional anime timing, spacing, and anticipation to web elements. Activate when creating energetic, stylized UI motion.

anime-particle-systems.name: anime-particle-systems
anime-particle-systems.description: Creates stylized particle emissions like sparks, cherry blossoms, or energy dust. Activate when generating 2D or 3D particle bursts.

anime-title-impact-animation.name: anime-title-impact-animation
anime-title-impact-animation.description: Creates dramatic, large-scale title reveals with screen shake or impact frames. Activate for hero section typographic impacts.

background-aware-contrast-compositing.name: background-aware-contrast-compositing
background-aware-contrast-compositing.description: Ensures text and UI elements remain legible over dynamic, moving, or 3D backgrounds. Activate when placing content over video or WebGL canvases.

cinematic-camera-direction.name: cinematic-camera-direction
cinematic-camera-direction.description: Controls 3D camera movement, framing, and transitions. Activate when animating camera paths or interpolating views.

cinematic-web-typography.name: cinematic-web-typography
cinematic-web-typography.description: Implements high-end typographic scales, pairings, and layout for web. Activate when styling text elements for a cinematic or editorial feel.

creative-web-art-direction.name: creative-web-art-direction
creative-web-art-direction.description: Guides overall visual direction, color harmony, and mood for premium web experiences. Activate when establishing the initial design system or visual theme.

creative-web-skill-maintenance.name: creative-web-skill-maintenance
creative-web-skill-maintenance.description: Guidelines for updating and expanding this very skill library. Activate when authoring new skills.

energy-slash-and-trail-effects.name: energy-slash-and-trail-effects
energy-slash-and-trail-effects.description: Implements motion trails, slashes, and speed lines. Activate for dynamic swipe or movement trails.

foreground-occlusion-compositing.name: foreground-occlusion-compositing
foreground-occlusion-compositing.description: Integrates foreground DOM elements seamlessly with background 3D or video scenes to create depth. Activate when layering UI with 3D.

glsl-shader-effects.name: glsl-shader-effects
glsl-shader-effects.description: Authors custom vertex and fragment shaders for unique materials and distortions. Activate when standard 3D materials are insufficient.

gltf-asset-optimization.name: gltf-asset-optimization
gltf-asset-optimization.description: Compresses and optimizes 3D assets for fast web delivery. Activate before deploying heavy 3D models.

gsap-motion-direction.name: gsap-motion-direction
gsap-motion-direction.description: Orchestrates complex UI animations, layout transitions, and timeline sequences. Activate when building multi-step animations or interactive UI motion.

gsap-splittext-choreography.name: gsap-splittext-choreography
gsap-splittext-choreography.description: Creates intricate text reveal and typographic animations. Activate when animating individual words, lines, or characters of text.

interactive-3d-models.name: interactive-3d-models
interactive-3d-models.description: Handles loading, playing animations, and interacting with 3D models (glTF). Activate when incorporating external 3D assets.

interactive-audio-direction.name: interactive-audio-direction
interactive-audio-direction.description: Manages web audio, sound effects, and spatial audio tied to interactions. Activate when adding auditory feedback to UI or 3D.

lottie-motion-graphics.name: lottie-motion-graphics
lottie-motion-graphics.description: Implements After Effects exported animations using Lottie. Activate for pre-rendered vector animations without complex state.

pixijs-2d-vfx.name: pixijs-2d-vfx
pixijs-2d-vfx.description: Utilizes PixiJS for high-performance 2D WebGL effects like displacement maps or sprite particles. Activate for 2D WebGL VFX.

postprocessing-and-colour-grading.name: postprocessing-and-colour-grading
postprocessing-and-colour-grading.description: Applies full-screen WebGL effects like bloom, depth of field, and color correction. Activate to enhance 3D scene visual quality.

rapier-physics-integration.name: rapier-physics-integration
rapier-physics-integration.description: Adds rigid body physics simulations to 3D scenes. Activate when objects need gravity, collisions, or realistic interaction.

react-three-fiber-cinematic-scenes.name: react-three-fiber-cinematic-scenes
react-three-fiber-cinematic-scenes.description: Builds declarative 3D scenes using R3F. Activate when integrating Three.js within a React application.

responsive-scene-composition.name: responsive-scene-composition
responsive-scene-composition.description: Handles layout and positioning of 3D and 2D elements across different screen sizes. Activate when ensuring a scene looks good on both desktop and mobile.

responsive-vfx-performance.name: responsive-vfx-performance
responsive-vfx-performance.description: Manages pixel ratio, asset LOD, and effect toggling based on device capabilities. Activate to ensure smooth frame rates.

rive-interactive-vector-graphics.name: rive-interactive-vector-graphics
rive-interactive-vector-graphics.description: Integrates Rive state machines for interactive vector animations. Activate for complex, state-driven 2D illustrations.

scroll-video-and-frame-sequences.name: scroll-video-and-frame-sequences
scroll-video-and-frame-sequences.description: Synchronizes video playback or image sequence drawing with scroll position. Activate when scrub-animating media sequences.

single-viewport-scroll-storytelling.name: single-viewport-scroll-storytelling
single-viewport-scroll-storytelling.description: Builds immersive scroll-driven experiences that feel pinned or fixed. Activate when user scroll controls timeline progress rather than native scrolling.

svg-motion-graphics.name: svg-motion-graphics
svg-motion-graphics.description: Animates vector graphics for loaders, icons, and illustrations. Activate when drawing SVG paths or morphing shapes.

theatrejs-camera-authoring.name: theatrejs-camera-authoring
theatrejs-camera-authoring.description: Uses Theatre.js for visual timeline keyframing of 3D objects and cameras. Activate when visual keyframing is required for cinematic sequences.

threejs-foundations.name: threejs-foundations
threejs-foundations.description: Handles core Three.js setup including scene, renderer, and basic lighting. Activate when establishing a vanilla Three.js environment.

visual-browser-qa.name: visual-browser-qa
visual-browser-qa.description: Checklist and procedures for cross-browser visual verification of WebGL and advanced CSS. Activate before finalizing a feature.
